name: Boston Chicken Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 jar Great Northern beans (24 ounces, drained and rinsed)
1/2 cup Open Pit hickory-flavored BBQ sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Reconstitute the dry onions in hot water for 5 minutes.
2. Empty the jar of Great Northern beans into a 4-quart baking dish or pan.
3. Add the pork and beans to the dish with the beans, stirring in the reconstituted onions, ketchup, BBQ sauce, and chopped ham.
4. Bake uncovered at 350°F for about 30-35 minutes, stirring 2-3 times during cooking until hot.
5. Refrigerate covered for up to one week or freeze for up to four months.
